'''''Star Wars'' 102''' is the one-hundred-second issue in the [[Star Wars (1977)|''Marvel Star Wars'']] series of comics.

==Publisher's summary==
''Luke and Leia return to Iskalon to tell Kiro's family of his death. Waiting for them... ruthless Nagai invaders. And Iskalon's staunchest defender is... Kiro'' himself!<ref name="ma" />
